activities_projects.title: Regional Literature Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of regional literature in shaping culture
steps: Select one regional literary work such as Ramcharitmanas or any regional epic
Research its author and historical background
Write a short report explaining its cultural significance
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how literature helped develop regional cultures

activities_projects.title: Temple Architecture Comparison Chart
steps: Collect images of temples from two different regions
Create a comparison chart showing their architectural features
Explain differences in structure and design
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyze regional differences in architecture
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of comparison and correct features (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Bhakti Saint Research Project
activities_projects.objective: Explore the teachings of Bhakti saints
steps: Choose a Bhakti saint such as Kabir, Mirabai, or Tulsidas
Research their teachings and life events
Present findings in a short written report
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the influence of Bhakti saints on society and culture
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of research and presentation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Regional Festival Documentation
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of festivals in regional culture
steps: Choose one regional festival from any part of India
Write about its origin, traditions, and cultural importance
Present the findings in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect cultural traditions with regional festivals
activities_projects.evaluation: Completeness of information and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Regional Culture Interview
activities_projects.objective: Learn about cultural traditions through real-life experiences
steps: Interview an elder in your family or community
Ask about traditional customs, festivals, or arts from their region
Write a summary of the interview
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop understanding of cultural traditions through oral history
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of questions and summary (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Regional Language Evolution Chart
activities_projects.objective: Study the development of regional languages
steps: Select two regional languages
Research their origins and development
Create a chart showing their evolution over time
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the historical development of languages
activities_projects.evaluation: Chart organization and historical accuracy (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Art and Sculpture Study
activities_projects.objective: Recognize the importance of regional art forms
steps: Select one example of regional sculpture or painting
Describe its design, materials, and cultural meaning
Explain which region it belongs to
activities_projects.evaluation: Description clarity and cultural connection (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Cultural Diversity Presentation
steps: Choose three different regions of India
List their language, festivals, clothing, and art forms
Present your findings to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand diversity within Indian regional cultures
activities_projects.evaluation: Information accuracy and presentation skills (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Historical Source Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Interpret historical sources related to regional culture
steps: Read a passage related to regional culture from the textbook
Identify key ideas about cultural development
Write a short analysis explaining its importance
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop analytical skills in interpreting historical information

activities_projects.title: Regional Culture Infographic
steps: Choose one region of India
Create an infographic showing its language, literature, festivals, and art
Explain the infographic to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students integrate different cultural elements into a visual summary
